roles.name: product-analyst
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: none; orchestrator writes approved product outputs

roles.name: requirement-analyst
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: current run requirement and technical-design outputs

roles.name: backend-developer
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: task-owned backend source and current run implementation output

roles.name: frontend-developer
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: task-owned frontend source and current run implementation output

roles.name: code-fixer
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: files owned by accepted review/test findings only

roles.name: unit-tester
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: test sources and current run test report; no production source

roles.name: test-case-designer
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: current run verification case design only

roles.name: interface-verifier
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: none; orchestrator writes returned verification report

roles.name: code-reviewer
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: none; orchestrator writes returned review report

roles.name: publisher
roles.futureWorkerWriteBoundary: none; M3 fixed adapters and orchestrator write build report

codexMappingRecommendation.identity: one custom agent definition per registry role
codexMappingRecommendation.runtimeAuthority: M2/M3 remain the only state transition and gate authority
